Removing that dead code and fixing the background rect z-order call.The newly-created `refLayer` becomes the active layer, so `doc.textFrames.add()` tries to place into it while it's non-editable. Need to switch back to the main layer before adding the reference text frame.The `doc.layers.add()` call inserts the new layer at the top and makes it active even though we reassign `doc.activeLayer`.
